big_problem: Lab dashboard export still points at dynasty-comps OG when generic dashboard renderers load pulse data.
epic: Lab L5 — Dashboard OG cards match in-panel movers
slice_title: DashboardRenderer export uses /og/dashboard with riser/faller snapshot rows

acceptance_ref: FACTORY-DOD Gate C — /og/dashboard PNG ≥40KB with snapshot
acceptance_commands: npm run start --workspace=apps/web & sleep 8 && curl -s -o /tmp/og-dash.png -w '%{http_code} %{size_download}\n' 'http://localhost:3000/og/dashboard?download=1' && file /tmp/og-dash.png && kill %1 2>/dev/null || true
